sponsor_gate.storage_key_compatibility_note: legacy key intentionally preserved so previously accepted users are not forced through the gate again

preserved.health_boundary: everyday communication only; no diagnosis, treatment, prescription, dose or clinical advice

new_scope: selected current CEFR level becomes the real entry point for generated future sessions
all A1-C2 course-map levels remain manually accessible without artificial locks
completed sessions and progress survive level changes
future plan and adaptive practice exclude lower levels unless the learner opens them manually
mandatory sponsor countdown changed from 24 to 26 seconds
not_claimed: independent superiority over Duolingo or Babbel
